text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Kris S, has anything been troubling you? I'm sure
you're used to everyday life by now, but there
must be cultural differences you've yet to
overcome.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Well, if I had to say, milk here is... small.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Huh, that's right. Where you come from it's sold
by the gallon. I suppose some cultural gaps just
can't be bridged.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
I need it for protein shakes, and cereal. Shopping
is... inefficient.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Why don't I ask the school store if they can
stock gallon cartons?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Without any justification? They'll just give you a
vague excuse and leave it at that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
True, that is a concern. If only I had some
concrete data showing the need for gallon milk...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Monthly milk consumption. Its uses and
advantages. I'll prepare something.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You will? That'd be great, Kris S. I suppose I
should also survey the needs of other exchange
students.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You think they'll be open with the student council
president? You'll never get accurate data for
anything.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
If you're in need, why don't I lend you a hand? A
bunch of my girls are from abroad. Just make sure
you get results worth our time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh, well I suppose the board is set then. I'll get
to work preparing to negotiate. Sirius, Kris
S—onward, to victory!
